entries.main_competence: 1.2 Use mathematics to explain physical principles and phenomena
entries.specific_competence: (b) Explore the basic tenets of the physics of the atom (structure of atom and structure nuclear, radioactivity, nuclear radiations, nuclear processes and thermionic emission)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concepts of nuclear physics, radioactivity, nuclear radiation and thermionic emission
Field trip: Organized a field trip to the nearby industry/ hospital/ airport for student recognize the application of nuclear physics
ICT-based learning: Use different Online sources to guide students to analyse concepts related to the physics of the atom
entries.assessment: The concepts and principles related to the Physics of the atom are explored appropriately
resources: Periodic Table and chart showing radioactive elements
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.2 Use mathematics to explain physical principles and phenomena
entries.specific_competence: (d) Describe the concept of renewable energy (solar, hydropower, wind and geothermal energy)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Guide students to brainstorm on the concepts of renewable energy
Group discussion: Organize students in manageable groups to discuss various forms of renewable energy
ICT-based learning: Guide students through interactive simulations to explore the concept of renewable energy
entries.assessment: The concepts of renewable energy are described appropriately
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 1.2 Use mathematics to explain physical principles and phenomena
entries.specific_competence: (a) Apply mathematical knowledge to describe various principles and physical phenomena related to heat, physics of the atom, electronics and renewable energy
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Facilitate students in groups to apply mathematical knowledge to describe various principles and physical phenomena related to heat, physics of the atom, electronics and renewable energy

Problem based learning: Guide students to identify problems related to heat, physics of the atom electronics and renewable energy, and facilitate them to use mathematical knowledge or identified mathematical formula to find the solutions of identified problems
entries.assessment: Mathematical knowledge to describe various principles and physical phenomena are correctly applied
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct experiments in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of basic experimental skills in Physics (a) Carry out scientific investigations related to heat, physics of the atom, electronics and renewable energy
teaching_learning_activities: ICT based learning: Use different Online sources to guide students to conduct the scientific investigations on the application of various instruments in electronics, renewable and to investigate the physics of the atom and heat
Practical work: Guide the learners through step-wise procedure to use practical work to carried out scientific investigations
entries.assessment: Scientific investigations related to heat, physics of the atom, electronics and renewable energy are analysed appropriately
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Conduct experiments in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 2.2 Demonstrate mastery of data analysis, presentation and report writing in Physics (a) Use scientific report to communicate experimental results in Physics
teaching_learning_activities: Cooperative learning: Guide students in the proper use of online resources in presenting a scientific investigation report to communicate experimental results
entries.assessment: A scientific report is correctly used to communicate experimental results in Physics
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Evaluate and use information in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 3.1 Collect, describe and relate physical data (a) Collect and analyse data to explain various physical parameters (heat, physics of atom, electronics and renewable energy)
teaching_learning_activities: ICT based learning: Use different online sources (virtual lab) and web-based information to guide students to explore different methods of data collection in physics experiments
entries.assessment: Collected physics data are correctly analysed to explain various physical quantities
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Evaluate and use information in Physics
entries.specific_competence: (b) Collect and analyse data to explain experimental observations related to heat, physics of atom, electronics and renewable energy
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Guide students in groups to discuss various methods of data collections
Project work: Guide students to conduct mini research work and facilitate them to collect and organize data from the research work
ICT-based learning: Use different online sources and web-based information to guide students to visualize and explore different scenarios from variety of sources and present their observations
entries.assessment: Collected physical data are correctly analysed to explain experimental observations related to heat, physics of atom, electronics and renewable energy
resources: Online resources and other relevant materials
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)

entries.main_competence: 3.0 Evaluate and use information in Physics
entries.specific_competence: 3.2 Carry out a project in Physics (a) Complete and submit a report for the research project started in Form III
teaching_learning_activities: Problem-solving approach: Guide students with real-world problems that require them to analyze collected physics data to explain various physical parameters
Collaborative Learning: Guide the students to work in pairs or small groups to analyze and interpret collected physics data
ICT-based learning: Use different online sources and web-based information to guide to complete and submit project report
entries.assessment: Report for the research project started in Form III is completed and submitted
entries.references: Physics Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
